title: EOIR updates Privacy Act notice on Form EOIR-44, Immigration Practitioner/Organization Complaint Form
description_html:
The Executive Office for Immigration Review issued a notice and request for comments on proposed changes to Form EOIR-44, "Immigration Practitioner/Organization Complaint Form." The form is used by individuals filing complaints regarding immigration practitioners’ behavior in proceedings before EOIR. The only changes to the form are to the Privacy Act notice on the final page. The updated version states that the form's information collection is authorized by 8 U.S.C. § 1362 and 8 C.F.R. §§ 1003.101-1003.111. The prior version, revised in June 2023, states that the collection is authorized by 8 U.S.C. § 1362 and 8 C.F.R. §§ 1003.104, 1292.18. The updated version also directs the reader to access the online DOJ system of records and notices for a description of how EOIR may share the information submitted on Form EOIR-44.

Comments are accepted for 60 days.

Trump 2.0 [ID #1954]

The prior version of Form EOIR-44, released in January 2023 and revised in June 2023.
